title: Audio Device Troubleshooting
description: Diagnose audio devices, services, and related events before applying approved audio service restart.
starter_prompt: Troubleshoot audio output or microphone problems and only restart services after approval.

phases.prompt: Scope playback/microphone symptom and collect evidence before restarting services.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; function Section($n){ Write-Output ('== ' + $n + ' ==') }; Section 'Audio devices'; Get-PnpDevice -Class AudioEndpoint,MEDIA -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Class,FriendlyName,Status,InstanceId | Format-List; Section 'Audio services'; Get-Service Audiosrv,AudioEndpointBuilder -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Status,StartType,CanStop | Format-Table -AutoSize; Section 'Audio events'; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-7)} -MaxEvents 120 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -match 'Audio|Kernel-PnP|Service Control Manager' } | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,Message | Format-List

phases.prompt: Collect read-only audio device, service, and event evidence.
Analyze audio evidence. Identify service, driver, endpoint, mute/default-device, or permission causes and safe next steps.
Ask for explicit approval before restarting audio services. Offer restore point handling for service changes.
phases.completion: Approval and restore point decision are recorded.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output 'Restarting audio services after approval.'; Restart-Service Audiosrv -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Restart-Service AudioEndpointBuilder -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Service Audiosrv,AudioEndpointBuilder | Select-Object Name,Status,StartType | Format-Table -AutoSize

phases.prompt: Run only after approval and restore point offer. Restart audio services and capture final state.
phases.completion: Approved audio service restart completed or failure is recorded.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Get-Service Audiosrv,AudioEndpointBuilder -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Status,StartType | Format-Table -AutoSize; Get-PnpDevice -Class AudioEndpoint,MEDIA -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Class,FriendlyName,Status | Format-Table -AutoSize

phases.prompt: Verify audio services and endpoint status after approved action.
Check that service restart was justified and that driver replacement is not recommended without separate approval.

Create a technician and customer-ready handoff report with evidence, findings, actions/tools used, verification status, artifacts/logs, cleanup status, residual risk, and prioritized follow-up next actions.
Keep logs and reports. Remove only workflow-created scratch files.

acceptance_criteria: Audio device/service evidence is collected before repair.
Service restart runs only after approval.
Verification captures audio services and device status.
Final report includes evidence, actions, cleanup status, risks, and follow-up items.
